job_location: Gurugram - Work from the office (2 Saturdays in a month are working)
date_of_joining: Jan 2026 Onwards (Leaves will be allowed for exams)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months of Internship (for all courses) : Rs 18,000 per month Salary after 6 months of Internship will be as under : → For Graduates : INR 3.75 L.P.A.(Fixed) + Incentives → For Post Graduates : INR 4.25 L.P.A.(Fixed) + Incentives
package_salary.bond: If the student does not wish to join Calyxpod Talent Solutions Pvt Ltd post successful completion of the internship, or leaves before 6 Months after starting full-time employment, he/she will be entitled to pay an amount of INR 50,000 to Calyxpod Talent Solutions Pvt Ltd. The bond condition is also applicable in case he/she doesn’t complete the entire internship duration and chooses to leave in between. A signed cheque of INR 50,000 in the name of “Calyxpod Talent Solutions Pvt Ltd” has to be submitted as a security. This shall be returned to him/her post-completion of 6 months of full-time employment.
